title: Quality pass: clippy pedantic cleanup in crossbridge-client
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Run cargo clippy -p crossbridge-client with -W clippy::pedantic and resolve all 13 warnings. Top categories: cast_possible_truncation, unnecessary_wraps (jj_origin_url returns Result<Option<String>> but never Errs — collapse to Option<String>), needless_pass_by_value, missing_errors_doc, map_unwrap_or.

Acceptance criteria:
- cargo clippy -p crossbridge-client --all-targets -- -W clippy::pedantic -D warnings exits 0.
- No blanket #[allow] over whole modules — fix the underlying issues; only allow specific lints with a one-line justification.
- All existing tests still pass (cargo test -p crossbridge-client), including the end_to_end integration test.
- cargo fmt --check clean.
